channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saints coach Darren Rizzi unleashes wrath on punter after play vs Giants
item.description: New Orleans Saints interim head coach Darren Rizzi was seen tearing into punter Matthew Hayball during the team's game against the New York Giants on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nick Saban questions strength of schedule factor in CFP as Alabama misses field
item.description: Former Alabama Crimson Tide head coach Nick Saban wondered if strength of schedule was really a factor when it came to the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon, Georgia, Notre Dame, Texas top poll going into playoff; Tide ranked ahead of SMU
item.description: Georgia moved up to No. 2 behind Oregon in The Associated Press Top 25 on Sunday, Texas and Penn State remained in the top five after losing conference championship games, and Arizona State appeared in the top 10 for the first time in a decade.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: First 12-team College Football Playoff set, Oregon seeded No. 1 and SMU edges Alabama for last spot
item.description: The tournament starts Dec. 20-21 with four first-round games involving teams seeded 5-12. It concludes Jan. 20 with the national title game in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alabama AD makes case for Crimson Tide to get into College Football Playoff
item.description: Alabama athletics director Greg Byrne makes a case for the Crimson Tide to make the College Football Playoff despite not winning a conference championship and having three losses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Where to find our complete Week 15 coverage
item.description: Weekend highlights included Pittsburg's amazing comeback against Folsom, plus wins by Amador Valley, Moreau Catholic.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: What Packers coach called the Detroit Lions fan who ‘got in his face’ before game
item.description: Green Bay Packers head Coach Matt LaFleur had strong words about a Detroit Lions fan who “got in his face” on the field before the game.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Alexandre Pantoja successfully defends flyweight belt with technical submission of Kai Asakura
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Alexandre Pantoja staked his claim as one of the greatest flyweights in UFC history when he defended his title Saturday night with a technical submission of Japan's Kai Asakura, using a rear naked choke to put his challenger to sleep at the 2:05 mark of the second round.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Clemson's Dabo Swinney says SMU 'better be' in College Football Playoff after beating them in ACC title game
item.description: SMU's College Football Playoff fate is in the hands of the committee after losing the ACC title game, but Dabo Swinney says they belong.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: An Oregon win, a Clemson upset, and 'now what?' for Alabama in the College Football Playoff
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Undefeated Oregon pulled off the expected and grabbed the top spot in the College Football Playoff. Underdog Clemson pulled off a last-second stunner and stole one of the last ones.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Oregon staves off valiant Penn State effort to win Big Ten title
item.description: The Oregon Ducks moved to 13-0 by winning the Big Ten championship game over Penn State on Saturday, ensuring a first-round bye in the playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 5 Georgia pulls off another overtime stunner, beating No. 2 Texas 22-19 for SEC title
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Georgia Bulldogs were struggling to get anything going against Texas, and there was little reason to be hopeful of a turnaround with their quarterback crumpled on the turf. Enter a guy who had barely played in his college career.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kalani Sitake signs long-term contract extension
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 10-2 season, BYU has signed head coach Kalani Sitake to a long-term contract extension that will keep him in Provo well into the future.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 18 Clemson beats No. 8 SMU 34-31 on last-second field goal for ACC title, berth in the CFP
item.description: Cade Klubnik threw for 262 yards and four touchdowns, Nolan Hauser kicked 56-yard field goal as time expired and the No. 18 Clemson beat No.
item.dc:creator: Steve Reed, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Utes drop first home game to St. Mary's, 72-63
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes had won its first six home games by an average margin of 32 points. But they hadn't played a team as talented as Saint Mary's. The Gaels came into the Huntsman Center Saturday, and led by Paulius Murauskas, beat the utes, 72-63.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bamdad, Palmer score 2 TDs each, but SHP falls to Summerville in NorCal 6-A title game
item.description: Sacred Heart Prep didn't have a satisfactory answer for Summerville quarterback Bryce Leveroos, who scored six touchdowns to lead his team to victory in Atherton.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Arizona State coach Kenny Dillingham sends clear message to playoff selection committee after winning Big 12
item.description: The 12-team College Football Playoff requires the top four seeds be conference champs. But Mountain West winner Boise State could keep ASU out of one of those coveted spots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Willy Adames agrees to $182 million, 7-year deal with the Giants, AP source says
item.description: Willy Adames has agreed to a $182 million, seven-year contract with San Francisco, providing the Giants with a power-hitting shortstop in the prime of his career, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas native Amber Glenn wins biggest US women's figure skating title in 14 years, beating Japan's stars
item.description: Amber Glenn won the first women's singles final gold medal at the figure skating Grand Prix for the U.S. since 2010, and she could make her first Olympics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: George Pickens fined over $20,000 after criticisms about behavior from head coach: report
item.description: Just days after Mike Tomlin said George Pickens needs to "grow up," the star receiver was reportedly hit with over $20,000 in fines from unsportsmanlike conduct penalties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Norris takes pole for season-ending Abu Dhabi GP and Hamilton 18th in Mercedes farewell
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — McLaren's 26-year wait for a Formula 1 constructors' title could soon be over. Lewis Hamilton's time with Mercedes is set to end on a low.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn competes in a pair of downhills, another step on her comeback trail at the age of 40
item.description: COPPER MOUNTAIN, Colo. (AP) — For a pair of lower-level downhill events, this sure had plenty of Olympic medal-capturing and World Cup-winning ski racers.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Everton vs. Liverpool postponed because of Storm Darragh. Other Premier League games remain on
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — The Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool was postponed on Saturday because of Storm Darragh, which brought dangerous winds and heavy rain to the west coast. The Premier League match was due to kick off at 12.30 p.m. U.K.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Haliburton scores 23 points as the Pacers beat the Bulls 132-123
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Tyrese Haliburton had 23 points and eight assists, and the Indiana Pacers stopped a four-game slide with a 132-123 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night. Pascal Siakam scored 21 points for Indiana, and Bennedict Mathurin finished with 19.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jets take on the Blackhawks Saturday following overtime win
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (19-8, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (8-16-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 4 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Winnipeg Jets visit the Chicago Blackhawks after the Jets defeated the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Batty, Ferrin named to All-Big 12 first team
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Three Cougars were named first-team All-Big 12 including defensive end Tyler Batty, offensive left tackle Caleb Etienne and kicker Will Ferrin. In addition, senior defensive back Jakob Robinson and junior kick returner Keelan Marion earned All-Big 12 Second Team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks' losing streak reaches 4 games after 4-2 loss to Bruins
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Brad Marchand and Morgan Geekie each scored two goals, and the Boston Bruins beat the struggling Chicago Blackhawks, 4-2 , on Wednesday night. Boston posted its third consecutive win — all in the past four days. It rallied for a 3-2 overtime victory against Detroit on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies win MWC opener over Wyoming, 70-67
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The undefeated streak is still going for the Aggies. Ian Martinez scored 17 of his 23 points in the second half to help Utah State defeat Wyoming 70-67 on Wednesday night at The Spectrum. Mason Falslev's layup with 35 seconds left stretched Utah State's lead to 70-64.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU inks 18 players on National Signing Day
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU football head coach Kalani Sitake announced 18 high school signees to the 2025 recruiting class on Wednesday’s first day of the December early signing period.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nick Rimando elected to National Soccer Hall of Fame
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Former Real Salt Lake goalkeeper Nick Rimando has been elected to the National Soccer Hall of Fame. Rimando will be enshrined with the Class of 2025 on May 3, 2025 in Frisco, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Dallas, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Casey DeSmith made 34 saves for the Dallas Stars, who held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Monday. It was DeSmith's first win since Oct. 24.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5
